business_ideas.idea: Replicate New Zealand roadside hole-in-one challenge at multiple locations globally
PatronView-style donor research platform aggregating cultural/philanthropic data
Launch AI-first medical practice using AI co-pilots and assistants from day one

predictions.text: Within couple years, not using AI at work will be equivalent to coming to work without computer
Not using AI diagnostics as radiologist will become considered medical malpractice
Self-driving adoption will take 5+ years, especially for rural and specialty-use vehicles
Data labeling businesses may become obsolete in 7-10 years as AI learns to self-label
Self-driving will reshape cities: parking lots become parks, eliminate truck driving jobs
